properties.name: Validate board name format
properties.description: Assert the board name matches /^[A-Za-z0-9][A-Za-z0-9_-]*$/ and reject with 400 on mismatch.

properties.name: Read board file and meta in parallel
properties.description: Concurrently read the .excalidraw file bytes, the file mtime stat, and the .meta.json sidecar from the filesystem.

properties.name: Parse and validate scene JSON
properties.description: Parse the raw file buffer as JSON and reject with 422 if it is not a valid Excalidraw scene (type !== "excalidraw").

properties.name: Repair arrow bindings in-memory
properties.description: Run repairArrowBindings() to add missing reverse boundElements entries so the Excalidraw canvas treats arrows as attached without touching the on-disk file.

properties.name: Analyst saves canvas edits
properties.description: Analyst triggers a PUT /boards/:name request from the Excalidraw canvas (debounced onChange); the request body carries the mutated scene JSON.

properties.name: Validate board name and scene shape
properties.description: Assert the URL board name matches the allowed pattern and that the request body contains a scene object with an elements array; reject 400 on failure.

properties.name: Write scene to disk atomically
properties.description: Serialize the scene to a .tmp file, then rename it over the target .excalidraw file to guarantee atomic replacement.

properties.name: Register self-write suppression marker
properties.description: Call markSelfWrite(boardName) so the chokidar fs-watcher suppresses the echo change-event that would otherwise trigger a redundant tree.changed broadcast and PUT loop.

properties.name: Compute unsynced-edits status and update meta
properties.description: Hash the freshly saved scene, compare with contentHashAtLastSync from the meta sidecar, and write an updated meta.json without touching the sync hash.

properties.name: Validate board name and classify kind
properties.description: Assert the board name format, resolve the file path, call classifyBoard(), and reject import/other kinds with 400 before any async work starts.
